headline: Jim Cramer Notes Arm Holdings Stock Is “Going Parabolic”
summary: Arm Holdings plc (NASDAQ:ARM) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. headline: Jim Cramer Says “QUALCOMM Was Considered More of a Niche Cell Phone Play, and No Longer”
summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated (NASDAQ:QCOM) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted, as he discussed the massive AI infrastructure buildout. Cramer highlighted the company’s latest deal with a hyperscaler, as he said: QUALCOMM, okay, this one was up 15% today. It had been an out-of-favor semi. Now, it’s in favor. headline: Big Tech Earnings Show Split Between AI Trade Winners and Losers
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The world’s biggest technology companies posted strong earnings last week, showing that the artificial intelligence boom is alive and well. But in the stock market, investors are getting more granular as they try to divvy up the winners and losers in the AI trade.Most Read from BloombergSupertanker Appears to Have Crossed the Strait of HormuzWorld’s Largest Container Carrier Plans Route Avoiding HormuzBeijing Tells China Firms to Ignore US Sanctions on RefinersPhilippines Says Tho

headline: How The Investment Story For Qualcomm (QCOM) Is Shifting With AI And Smartphone Uncertainty
summary: The consensus analyst fair value estimate for QUALCOMM has shifted from US$154.93 to US$168.50, providing an updated reference point for how the Street is currently framing the stock. That move reflects a tug of war between bullish firms raising targets on AI, automotive, and IoT potential, and bearish voices focusing on smartphone maturity and the well‑flagged loss of Apple business. Read on to see how to interpret these competing narratives and keep track as the story evolves. Analyst Price...
